title: Why I never trust fully generated Code
summary: JavaScript Mastery author expresses distrust in fully generated code from AI systems. The piece represents a viewpoint on code generation reliability and best practices for developers.
writeup: The video presents the JavaScript Mastery author's argument for not trusting fully AI-generated code, framing reliability as the central concern. It situates this distrust within a broader discussion of code generation and AI safety, treating developer best practices as the relevant frame. The takeaway is a skeptical stance: AI output should not be accepted wholesale, and reliability remains the open question for code generation.
